decisions: ACCEPT: M7 save migration boundary now supports local-compatible-load-only for M1-M6 accepted saves and keeps M7 Beta content-lock manifests candidate-only with Human Gate/security review.

ACCEPT: cloud save remains candidate-boundary-only; no account, network sync, telemetry, secrets, provider, server persistence, paid service, remote collection, implicit RPC, object graph serialization, or cloud implementation is introduced.
ACCEPT: QA P1 accepted-save M7 bypass is fixed and covered by regression; no Human Gate is active for this task.
risks: Formal M7 content lock acceptance remains future Human Gate work and is not approved by this task.
Future irreversible migration, cloud-save enablement, account-backed persistence, network persistence, telemetry/accounts/secrets, and frozen save/platform changes remain Human Gates.
